name: 6" Variable Speed Polisher
description: Professional 6 inch variable speed polisher/grinder with 6 Amp motor and soft start feature. Delivers 2500-6800 OPM for polishing, sanding, and grinding applications. Ideal for automotive detailing, marine finishing, and industrial surface treatment.

specs.switchType: Variable speed dial with trigger lock

userBenefits: Variable speed dial (2,500-6,800 OPM) matches pad speed to compound and surface for swirl-free results
Soft start prevents splatter of polishing compound and reduces torque kickback at power-on
Dual handle configuration (side + bail) provides two-handed control for even pressure distribution
6 Amp motor maintains consistent speed under load for uniform gloss across large panels
5/8"-11 spindle thread accepts industry-standard polishing pads and backing plates
